content.en_us: The cooler is an optional component that can be used to cool an [[RBMK]], however unlike the [[steam channel|RBMK Steam Channel]], the cooler does not allow the heat to be extracted and used. The RBMK cooler uses up cold perfluoromethyl and outputs regular PFM at a constant rate of 50mB/t, and rapidly cools down all RBMK components in a 5x5 area by 200°C/t.
